Quests.Name: {{ModID}}_PoppyFetch
Quests.Title: Pain-Relieving Poppies
Quests.Description: Aelin isn't having any luck growing flowers.
Quests.ReactionText: Oh, these are perfect! Thank you so much, @!$1#$b#Here, this is the least I can do to thank you. I brewed it myself for you!$1

OfferDetails.Text: Hello, @,^I'm terribly sorry to bother you with this, but...well, I'm not having any luck with growing poppies to prepare my medicine, and I'm almost out.^I hate to bother, but, could I trouble you to bring me a few poppies?^- Aelin
